summary: Nagarik Incident Timeline Replay feature fully tested. Backend: 13/13 tests PASSED covering /replay and /timeline endpoints. Frontend: All UI components verified including Command Center Replay buttons, Replay Overlay, Timeline panel, Map, Playback controls, AI Narrative, Speed buttons, and standalone route.

test_categories.authentication: 2 PASS - Both replay and timeline endpoints return 401/403 without auth
test_categories.replay_full_dataset: 1 PASS - Returns all required fields: incident_id, device_id, device_identifier, senior_name, incident_type, severity, status, escalation_level, incident_time, replay_window, frames, events, location_trail, stats, ai_narrative
test_categories.replay_window: 1 PASS - Correct window structure with start/end timestamps, before_minutes=10, after_minutes=5 for SOS alert
test_categories.frames_structure: 1 PASS - Frames have timestamp, elapsed_s, location (lat/lng), speed, anomaly_score, events
test_categories.events_structure: 1 PASS - Events have time, type, label, severity, icon fields
test_categories.stats_structure: 1 PASS - Stats have total_frames, total_events, telemetry_points, anomalies, notifications_sent
test_categories.ai_narrative: 1 PASS - AI narrative generated (template fallback working)
test_categories.invalid_incident_404: 2 PASS - Both endpoints return 404 for invalid incident_id
test_categories.timeline_concise: 1 PASS - Timeline returns concise data without frames/location_trail
test_categories.incident_type_window: 1 PASS - SOS alert has correct 10m before + 5m after window

command_center.replay_buttons: PASS - Found 20 Replay buttons on incident rows (data-testid='replay-btn-{id}')
command_center.button_click: PASS - Clicking Replay button opens overlay

replay_viewer_components.controls: PASS - data-testid='replay-controls' with play/pause, skip buttons
replay_viewer_components.ai_narrative: PASS - data-testid='replay-narrative' shows AI analysis (274 chars)

standalone_route.status: PASS - Route works and displays full replay viewer

events: list of events at this frame

ai_narrative.source: GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM Key OR template fallback

mocked_apis.ai_narrative: Falls back to template if Emergent LLM Key balance is low (tested with template fallback)

critical_code_review_comments: Replay engine correctly builds timeline from telemetry, anomalies, notifications, and related incidents
Frame interpolation from GPS trail working correctly
Event markers appear on progress bar at correct timeline positions
AI narrative fallback template provides meaningful content when LLM unavailable
Frontend overlay properly integrates with Command Center incidents panel
context_for_next_testing_agent: Incident Timeline Replay feature complete. Key points: 1) /api/operator/incidents/{id}/replay returns full dataset with frames (5s intervals), events, location_trail, stats, ai_narrative, 2) /api/operator/incidents/{id}/timeline returns concise event list, 3) Command Center shows Replay buttons on each incident row, 4) Replay overlay shows map, timeline, playback controls, AI narrative, 5) Standalone route /operator/incident-replay/:id works, 6) AI narrative falls back to template when LLM unavailable.
